arts.ttl: It was a game of two halves - Frank on Brentford defeat by Man Utd
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank says his side "did a lot of things right" in the first 45 minutes before a "disappointing" second half led to a 2-1 defeat by Manchester United in the Premier League at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund inspire Man Utd back to winning way
arts.sum: Ethan Pinnock had put Brentford ahead in first half stoppage time.

arts.ttl: Manchester United’s sense of injustice sparks comeback win for Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United 2-1 Brentford: Fury at the opening goal at Old Trafford fueled a second-half comeback and a first win in a month for the Dutchman

arts.ttl: Man United 2-1 Brentford: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Hojlund, Garnacho score
arts.sum: Goals from Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund help Manchester United come from behind to beat Brentford 2-1 in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd snap winless run with win vs. Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester United bounced back after conceding a controversial goal to beat Brentford 2-1 at Old Trafford on Saturday for their first victory in more than a month.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund inspire Man Utd back to winning way
arts.sum: Ethan Pinnock had put Brentford ahead in first half stoppage time.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag handed major reprieve as Man Utd survive Brentford scare - 5 talking points
arts.sum: MAN UTD 2-1 BRENTFORD: Goals from Rasmus Hojlund and Alejandro Garnacho gave Erik ten Hag's side their first win in six games, having gone behind to Thomas Frank's men

arts.ttl: Man United 2-1 Brentford: Second-half goals from Alejandro Garnacho and Rasmus Hojlund see hosts come from behind to end their five-game winless run and ease the pressure on Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: United won for the first time in six games by coming from behind to beat Brentford. The Bees took the lead just before half-time when Ethan Pinnock headed home from a corner.

arts.ttl: Why Erik ten Hag received yellow card vs Brentford after Matthijs de Ligt decision
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag was left fuming after Manchester United conceded from a corner when Matthijs de Ligt had to be taken off for treatment

arts.ttl: Alex Ferguson absence at Old Trafford explained after leaving Man Utd role
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson was a notable absentee at Old Trafford as Manchester United hosted Brentford in the Premier League. The legendary former manager’s non appearance comes after INEOS dropped him from his role as a club ambassador, which he had held since 2013.
